---
title: "Lab 5b: Capstone — Composite Index & Communication Map (QGIS)"
subtitle: "Intro GIS for Public Health · QGIS track · Day 5"
---

::: {.lab-download}
[Download this lab (Word)](downloads/Lab05b_Capstone_QGIS_PH.docx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm download="Lab05b_Capstone_QGIS_PH.docx"}
[ArcGIS Online version](lab5b-online.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
[ArcGIS Pro version (Word)](downloads/Lab05b_CartographicModeling_ArcGISPro_PH.docx){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm download="Lab05b_CartographicModeling_ArcGISPro_PH.docx"}
:::

{{< include _lab5b-qgis.md >}}
